title: DetectForge — Financial Risk Dashboard
description: Detection gaps ranked by annual financial exposure (FAIR model, IBM X-Force 2025)

options.query: | inputlookup detectforge_gaps | where status!="CLOSED" | sort -financial_exposure_usd | head 10 | eval exposure_m=round(financial_exposure_usd/1000000,2) | eval priority=round(priority_score,3) | table technique_id,technique_name,tactic,status,exposure_m,priority

| inputlookup detectforge_gaps | stats sum(financial_exposure_usd) as total, sum(eval(if(status="CLOSABLE",financial_exposure_usd,0))) as closable, sum(eval(if(status="DATA_GAP",financial_exposure_usd,0))) as data_gap by industry
| inputlookup detectforge_gaps | where status!="CLOSED" | stats sum(financial_exposure_usd) as exposure by tactic | eval exposure_m=round(exposure/1000000,2) | sort -exposure

status.data: > table | seriesByName("status") | formatByValue(matchMode="regex") | case("CLOSABLE", {"background":"#e74c3c"}), case("DATA_GAP", {"background":"#95a5a6"}), case("DATA_PARTIAL", {"background":"#f39c12"})

options.markdown: **Methodology:** FAIR financial model — Annual Loss Expectancy = Threat Event Frequency × Org Size Factor × Industry Score × Breach Cost. Data sources: IBM Cost of a Data Breach 2025 ($9.8M healthcare avg), Verizon DBIR 2025. Figures are estimates for risk prioritisation only.
